query:
UPDATE prestataires.prestataire
             SET statut = 'agree', statut_decide_par = $2, statut_decide_le = now(),
                 statut_motif = NULL,
                 jeton_plaque = COALESCE($3, jeton_plaque),
                 code_secours = COALESCE($4, code_secours),
                 modifie_le = now()
             WHERE id = $1
